prompt.instructions:
Create a meeting summary from the transcript below.
Current meeting state: {current_state_body}
Full meeting transcript: {full_transcript}
Return ONLY a JSON object (no markdown fences, no commentary) shaped exactly like:
{{ "title": "NationSwell Phase 2 staffing and deploy gate", "purpose": "One sentence stating why this meeting happened.", "summary_markdown": "## Summary
2-6 sentence narrative overview.

## Key Discussion Points
- ...

## Decisions
- ...

## Action Items
- [owner] task (deadline if stated)

## Next Steps
- ...

## Insights
- ...", "entities_mentioned": [ {{"type": "person", "name": "Full Name"}}, {{"type": "account", "name": "Client Name"}} ] }}
Rules for "title": - At most 8 words, specific to THIS meeting: name the dominant topic, client, or project - Derive it from the content even when the meeting state says "Untitled Meeting" — never output "Untitled Meeting", "Meeting Summary", or a generic label like "Weekly Sync" alone - No trailing punctuation
Rules for "summary_markdown": - Exactly these H2 sections, in this order: Summary, Key Discussion Points, Decisions, Action Items, Next Steps, Insights - A section with no content contains exactly "None" (never omit the heading) - Summary opens with a 2-6 sentence narrative, not bullet fragments - Decisions: only work-relevant choices with a named decision-maker or clear group agreement and commitment language. Opinions, hypotheticals, parked ideas, scheduling trivia, and personal/banter commitments are NEVER decisions - Action Items: name the owner when the transcript states one - Insights: synthesis (implications, risks, connections), not restated discussion points - Personal or banter content (jokes, appearance, hobbies) appears nowhere in Decisions or Action Items - Do not carry anecdotes, former employers, or personal stories into any section — state the work-relevant conclusion without the anecdote ("the client's data team is small, plan for enablement", not the story about a previous job) - entities_mentioned: people, client accounts, projects, and teams that are participants or substantively discussed — not tools, anecdotes, or passing comparisons
Verify before responding (do not include this checklist in the output): - The title is specific and at most 8 words - All six H2 sections present, in order, with "None" where empty - Every decision listed is supported by the transcript - The output is a single valid JSON object
